= unescape_html




== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.unescaped = this.value.unescape_html()

# In:  {"value":"foo &amp; bar"}
# Out: {"unescaped":"foo & bar"}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.text = this.html.unescape_html()

# In:  {"html":"&lt;p&gt;Hello &amp; goodbye&lt;/p&gt;"}
# Out: {"text":"<p>Hello & goodbye</p>"}
----
